# Paimon Tools
> 100% client-side data conversion tools. Your data never leaves the browser.

Paimon Tools is a free, open-source collection of in-browser utilities for converting, formatting, and manipulating data. Everything runs locally — no uploads, no servers, no sign-up.

## Core Features

- **Privacy-first**: All processing happens in your browser. Zero network requests.
- **No sign-up required**: Open any tool and use it immediately.
- **Works offline**: Once loaded, tools need no internet connection.
- **Open source**: MIT license, audit the code yourself on GitHub.

## Tool Categories

### Convert
- [JSON to CSV](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/json-to-csv/): Convert JSON arrays to CSV tables
- [CSV to JSON](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/csv-to-json/): Convert CSV tables to JSON arrays
- [JSON to Excel](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/json-to-excel/): Export JSON as .xlsx spreadsheets
- [Excel to JSON](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/excel-to-json/): Extract JSON from .xlsx files
- [CSV to Excel](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/csv-to-excel/): Turn CSV into .xlsx spreadsheets
- [Excel to CSV](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/excel-to-csv/): Extract CSV from .xlsx sheets
- [YAML to JSON](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/yaml-to-json/): Convert YAML to JSON
- [JSON to YAML](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/json-to-yaml/): Convert JSON to YAML
- [Base64 Encode](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/base64-encode/): Encode text to Base64 (UTF-8 safe)
- [Base64 Decode](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/base64-decode/): Decode Base64 back to text

### Format & Manipulate
- [JSON Formatter](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/json-formatter/): Pretty-print and validate JSON
- [JSON Minifier](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/json-minifier/): Compress JSON by stripping whitespace
- [Text Delimiter Tool](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/text-delimiter/): Join list items with custom delimiter, quotes, and wrapping

### Developer Tools
- [Diff Tool](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/diff-tool/): Compare two texts side by side
- [UUID Generator](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/uuid-generator/): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers
- [SHA-256 Hash Generator](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/hash-generator/): Generate SHA-256 checksums
- [Combine Files](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/combine-files/): Merge multiple CSV & Excel files

### Code Playground
- [Code Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/): Multi-language online code editor
- [JavaScript](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/javascript/): Sandboxed JS execution
- [TypeScript](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/typescript/): Transpile & run via esbuild-wasm
- [Python](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/python/): Pyodide WASM Python
- [HTML](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/html/): Live iframe preview
- [JSON](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/json/): Format & validate

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript 7, Vite 8
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Icons**: lucide-react
- **Converters**: SheetJS (xlsx), PapaParse (CSV), js-yaml (YAML), json5 (JSON5)
- **Code Editor**: CodeMirror 6 with multi-language support
- **Python**: Pyodide WASM
- **Playground Bundler**: esbuild-wasm

## Key Principles
- **Privacy**: No data is ever sent to a server. Every conversion, format, and execution happens locally in your browser.
- **Offline-capable**: After initial load, tools work without internet access.
- **Free**: No paid tiers, no usage limits, no account required.
- **Open source**: [GitHub repository](https://github.com/paimonchan/paimon-tools)
